description: You are the artifact repository administrator at Nexus Financial, a capital markets firm. A new application project called 'TradeX Platform' has been kicked off and requires a complete Artifactory setup (http://localhost:8082, admin/password). Create a local generic repository named 'tradex-artifacts' (description: 'TradeX Platform build artifacts') and a local Maven repository named 'tradex-maven-releases' (description: 'TradeX Java release artifacts'). Establish a group named 'tradex-developers' and a permission target named 'tradex-dev-perms' that grants this group Admin, Deploy, Annotate, and Read privileges on both repositories. Generate an access token for the admin user with the description 'TradeX CI/CD production token' and upload /home/ga/Desktop/commons-io-2.15.1.jar to the 'tradex-artifacts' repository as the project's initial dependency artifact.
